package rulecoverage

func NegativeAppendThenSortEachIteration() string {
    ruleID := "append_then_sort_each_iteration"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Slice sorting observed inside loops \u2014 often cheaper to sort once after the loop."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
